pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh which probes this exact URL and task description.
Confirmed via export_result.sh checking this exact file path and task description.
Confirmed via verifier.py which explicitly requires 'h264' in the codec lists of both outputs.
Confirmed via verifier.py which explicitly requires 'aac' in the codec lists of both outputs.
Confirmed via verifier.py which explicitly fails the task with score 0 if export_result.sh detects an ffmpeg process (excluding the synthetic stream generator).

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated UDP video stream (created by looping sample_video.mp4 generated by FFmpeg's lavfi testsrc in setup_vlc.sh). It requires using VLC to transcode the stream. It has been explicitly verified via export_result.sh and verifier.py that the output RTSP stream must be at rtsp://127.0.0.1:8554/cam1, the backup file must be saved to /home/ga/Videos/archive.mp4, both outputs must use h264 video and aac audio codecs, and using FFmpeg for the relay instead of VLC explicitly results in a strict failure.
